faq.answer: All Weather Series 6200 is part of the manufacturer's lineup: window and door products suited to different home styles. Deluxe Windows checks that this collection matches the opening sizes and design goals before recommending it.

faq.question: How is installed pricing for All Weather Series 6200 calculated?
faq.answer: Installed pricing for All Weather Series 6200 reflects opening dimensions, configuration, glass, finish, quantity and access. As a reference, the current promotion prices installations from $549 per window installed (regular $915).

faq.question: How do I order All Weather Series 6200 with installation?
faq.answer: Ordering All Weather Series 6200 starts with a free on-site measurement; Deluxe Windows then quotes the collection installed, places the factory order and schedules the crew, so one contract covers product, installation and warranty registration.

faq.question: Do dual pane windows reduce heat?
faq.answer: Energy performance for all weather series 6200 comes from the whole unit: frame, Low-E glass, gas fill, spacers and installation. ENERGY STAR certified windows save about 12% on energy bills, and qualifying models may earn the $600 federal 25C tax credit.
